name: Off-Mic Podcast
description: Asha's independent podcast. Pilot edits, guest coordination, landing page, newsletter, and the Oct 2 public debut. Owned by Asha outright, not the station.

name: Rhythm FM Morning Show
description: The Asha Gallegos Show and its recurring segments (Voices of the City) plus the Rhythm FM 30th anniversary documentary. Station-owned editorial work.
